verse.name: v1
verse.lines: For Thou, O Lord, art high above all the earth Thou art exalted far above all gods For Thou, O Lord, art high above all the earth Thou art exalted far above all gods

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I exalt Thee, I exalt Thee I exalt Thee, O Lord I exalt Thee, I exalt Thee I exalt Thee, O Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We exalt Thee, We exalt Thee We exalt Thee, O Lord We exalt Thee, We exalt Thee We exalt Thee, O Lord

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oh with all we have And with all we are We have come so far To lift Your name Lift Your name on high, Jesus Cause it's all about You, oh Jesus Oh it's all about You And this love, this song, this praise Is what we bring to You
